message:
Extend ANSI CSI sequence handling to ansi_to_html and strip_ansi

Consistent with the viewport.rs fix, these functions now properly handle
all CSI sequences, not just SGR color codes ending in 'm':

ansi_to_html:
- Add in_csi state to track CSI sequences
- Only process SGR sequences (ending in 'm') for HTML styling
- Other CSI sequences (cursor, erase, etc.) are silently consumed

strip_ansi:
- Properly strip all CSI sequences ending with any byte in '@' through '~'
- Handle simple escape sequences (single char after ESC)
- Add doc comment explaining CSI sequence structure

This ensures HTML export and plain text extraction work correctly with
content containing screen control sequences, not just color codes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
